3036110.name: Spellslinger Demo
3036110.description: Spellslinger is an RPG Strategy Word Game where you play as a Spellslinger: a powerful wizard brought back from the dead to stop The Dark One from regaining power. You will spell words from a 4x4 tile grid, cast spells that modify your attacks, cast incantations with mana, and use magical artifacts as part of strategic synergies to defeat your enemies. Brew elixirs, meet companions, and use your knowledge and intellect as you explore the fallen kingdom of Primordia and face deadly foes on your journey to defeat The Dark One.
